title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services:
Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels Retail Holdings Services!
